ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the player position (e.g., attacker, midfielder, defender, goalkeeper) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the player position */,
  "is_field_position" INTEGER /* Indicates if the position is a field position (not goalkeeper) */,
  "average_height" REAL /* Average height of players in this position */,
  "average_weight" REAL /* Average weight of players in this position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player position the statistic belongs to */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the statistic belongs to */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match the statistic is for */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "passing_accuracy" REAL /* Passing accuracy percentage */,
  "possession_percentage" REAL /* Possession percentage */,
  "corner_kicks" INTEGER /* Number of corner kicks */,
  "offside" INTEGER /* Number of offside incidents */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES player_positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the tournament is held */,
  "total_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams participating */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the tournament's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the tournament's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_tournaments" (
  "team_tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-tournament relationship */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team participating in the tournament */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the team is participating in */,
  "group" TEXT /* The group the team is in (if applicable) */,
  "stage" TEXT /* The stage of the tournament the team is in (e.g., group stage, knockout stage) */,
  "final_position" INTEGER /* The final position of the team in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_tournaments_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_tournaments_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the team data */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the team data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in the version */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "is_current_version" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_statistic_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_id") REFERENCES statistics ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_position_statistics" (
  "position_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player position statistic */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player position the statistic belongs to */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic the player position belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the statistic for the player position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_position_statistics_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES player_positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_position_statistics_statistic_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_id") REFERENCES statistics ("statistic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics_history" (
  "team_statistic_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic history */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic history belongs to */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic the history belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the history belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the statistic was recorded */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic history belongs to */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_statistic_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_history_statistic_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_id") REFERENCES statistics ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_history_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_history_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_statistics" (
  "tournament_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament statistic */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the statistic belongs to */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic the tournament belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the statistic for the tournament */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_statistics_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_statistics_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_statistics_statistic_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_id") REFERENCES statistics ("statistic_id")
)
